reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: (수정) 작년에 쿨매트를 처음 구입했는데 사용하지 않아서 쿨매트를 안좋아하는 줄 알았어요. 혹시나하고 날씨가 덥길래 올해 꺼내줘봤더니 갑자기 잘 사용하네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 더위를 많이 타는 강아지는 아닌데 산책하고 더웠는지 쿨매트가 시원한가봐요!!🤍
reviews.content_en: (Update) I bought a cooling mat last year but my dog didn't use it, so I thought he just didn't like cooling mats. But when the weather got hot this year, I took it out just in case and suddenly he's using it so much lol 😂 He's not a dog that gets hot easily, but I guess after our walks when he's warm, the cooling mat feels nice and cool!! 🤍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
와,, 곰팡이고 뭐고 그냥 이거 사는게 맞네요 ㅋㅋ 이런 겔타입 쿨매트 곰팡이 생긴다고 해서.. 실제로 바잇미에서 제작년인가 산거 작년까지 잘 썼는데 올해도 사용하려고 꺼냈더니 곰팡이 펴있어서 다 버리고 겔타입 살지 그냥 듀라론 매트로 살지 계속 고민하다가 안전하게 쓰는게 맞겠지 싶어서 듀라론 쿨매트로 싹 갈았는데요,, 듀라론도 어디께 좋을지 고민하다가 두 곳 제품 구매했는데 둘 다 제가 살 갖다 대보면 대는 순간만 시원해서 이게 애들한테 도움이 되는게 맞나.. 하는 생각이 들었거든요ㅠㅠ 그래도 도움 좀 되면 좋겠다 싶어서 선풍기로 매트 온도 내려주면서 깔아두었는데 흠ㅋㅋ
근데 이 제품은 그냥 계속 시원해요ㅠㅠ👍🏻 애가 제품 펴자마자 올라가서 내려올 생각을 안 하네요 ㅋㅋ 그리고 다른 제품들보다 훨씬 무거워서 더 폭신한 느낌이네요 😁 처음에 이거 작은 사이즈 사서 여름에 여행 다닐 때 이동가방에 깔 생각이었는데 큰일 날 뻔😂
큰 사이즈 몇 개 더 사서 각 방에도 깔아둬야겠어요 :-)
예전에 제가 산건 다른 업체랑 콜라보였던 것 같은데 그 때도 듀께는 두툼했는데 크기는 더 커져서 이번 콜라보가 더 좋은 것 같아요 ㅋㅋ 곰팡이 생기면 새로 갈게 계속해서 이 사이즈로 나오면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: Wow,, forget about mold and stuff - this is definitely the right purchase lol I heard gel-type cooling mats get moldy, so... I actually bought one from BITE ME a couple years ago and used it well through last year, but when I took it out this year it had mold all over it so I threw it away. I kept going back and forth between getting another gel type or switching to a DURALON mat for safety, so I switched everything to DURALON cooling mats. I bought products from two different places and when I tested them by holding them, they only felt cool at that moment, so I wasn't sure if it was actually helping my dog 😭 Still hoping it helps a little, so I set them out with a fan blowing on them to keep the temperature down, but hmm lol But this product stays cool the whole time 😭👍🏻 My dog jumps on it as soon as I lay it out and won't get off lol And it's much heavier than other products so it feels much more cushiony 😁 At first I bought the small size thinking I'd use it in my travel bag for summer trips, but that was a close one 😂 I'm going to buy a few more of the large sizes and put them in each room :-)I think my previous purchase was a collaboration with another brand, and it was thick back then too, but the size was bigger. This collaboration seems even better lol If mold grows I'll just get a new one - I really hope this size keeps coming out!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
쿨매트 크기도 딱 적당하고 깔아주니깐 위에서 시원하게 너무 잘자네용
저도 앉아봤는데 궁댕이가 바로 차가워질 정도로 시원해요!! 
여름 아이템으로 강추합니다!!!!
reviews.content_en: The cooling mat size is just right and once I laid it out, my dog sleeps so well and cool on top of it! I even sat on it myself and my butt got cold right away - it's that cool!! Highly recommend as a summer must-have!!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
시원한지 꺼내주자마자 낼름 앉아서 벗어나질않네요ㅎ
작년에 바잇미쿨매트를 하나샀었는데, 좋아서 하나더 구매했었어요. 
근데 가방이나 개모차사이즈로는 좋은데 큰게없어서 아쉽더라구요. 그래서 다른 브랜드걸로 큰걸샀었는데, 금방 곰팡이가생겨서 버렸었어요. 근데 바잇미꺼는 멀쩡하더라구요!!!그래서 바잇미 쿨매트 큰거 기다리고있었는데 마침 나와서 냉큼 구매했어요. 
더워지면 옆으로 옮겨도 될정도의 사이즈라 맘에들어요! 디자인도 양면이네요!
reviews.content_en: As soon as I took it out he sat right on it and won't budge lol I bought one BITE ME cooling mat last year and liked it so much I bought another. But it was only good for bag or stroller sizes and they didn't have a bigger one, which was disappointing. So I bought a larger size from a different brand, but it got moldy quickly and I had to throw it away. But the BITE ME one is still in perfect condition!!! So I was waiting for a larger BITE ME cooling mat and it finally came out, so I bought it right away. The size is great because I can move it around when it gets hot, and the design is two-sided!

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content: 두 마리 키워서 L 사이즈로 했습니다! 양면 컬러가 달라 집 인테리어에 따라 배치하면 돼서 좋아요. 손바닥 닿자마자 시원해요 굿굿💛
reviews.content_en: I have two dogs so I got the L size! I love that the two-sided colors are different so I can arrange it based on my home's interior. It's cool the moment it touches your palm - great! 💛

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 이번여름도 무진장 덥다고 해서 여기저기 알아보다가 마침 세일을하더라구요 ㅎㅎ 원래 쓰던거는 넘쪼꼬미라 일부러 라지 샀어요 냉장고에 넣고 20분정도 있다가 꺼내니 완전 시원하드라구요 ~디자인도 넘 귀엽고 예뻐요 🩷
reviews.content_en: This summer is supposed to be really hot so I looked around and happened to catch a sale lol The one I was using before was too small so I purposely got the large size. I put it in the fridge for about 20 minutes and when I took it out it was super cool 🩷 The design is also so cute and pretty!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
점점 침대도 안올라오고 베란다 바닥에 누워있기도해서 더운거같아서 대리석매트로 사주려다가 넘 이쁜 쿨매트가 나왔길래 사버림.. ㅋㅋ 이런 젤매트는 한여름에는 별로 안시원하다해서 안사려햇는데 포코리는 참을수가없었네요..
사긴샀는데 전혀 이용을 안해서 슬펏는데 오늘 왠일로 올라가있네요 ㅋㅋ 좀 익숙해졌나봐요
reviews.content_en: My dog has been avoiding the bed more and more and just lying on the balcony floor, so it seemed hot. I was about to buy him a marble mat but this beautiful cooling mat came out and I just had to get it lol I didn't want to buy a gel mat like this because I heard they're not very cool in the peak of summer, but I just couldn't resist this one. I bought it but he wasn't using it at all so I was sad, but today for some reason he's up on it lol Guess he's getting used to it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
전에 사용하던게 오래되어서 바꿔주려고 샀는데.. 강아지가 위에 올라가질 않아욬ㅋㅋ😅 일단 디자인 귀엽고 쿠션감이 폭신해요.
크기도 딱 좋네요~
reviews.content_en: I bought it to replace my old one, but my dog won't get on it lol 😅 At least the design is cute and it has a nice fluffy cushion feel. The size is perfect too~

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content: 라지사이즈 켄넬에 깔아주니까 넉넉하게 잘맞아요! 넘 더워해서 사줬는데 확실히 시원한지 덜 헥헥거려요. 다른 저렴 쿨매트랑 다르게 쿨젤도 완전 넉넉히 빵빵하게 들어가있습니다~~
reviews.content_en: I put the large size in the kennel and it fits nicely with room to spare! My dog gets really hot so I got it for him, and he's definitely cooler - he pants way less now. Unlike other cheap cooling mats, this one has completely full and generous cool gel inside~~

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 여러 쿨매트 사용해 봤는데 이 쿨매트가 제일 튼튼하고 오래가요 .. 다른 건 젤이 터지거나 곰팡이 쓸거나 하는데 얘는 그렇지 않아서 계속 재주문 하고 있습니다
reviews.content_en: I've tried several cooling mats but this one is the most durable and lasts the longest. Others have had the gel burst or gotten moldy, but this one doesn't so I keep reordering it.

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
산책할 때 유모차에 깔아 주려고 샀어요
크기도 크고 꽤 묵직한게 내구성이 좋아 보여서 맘에 들어요!
reviews.content_en: I bought it to put under my pup in the stroller when we go for walks. I love it because it's a good size and feels really sturdy and durable!

reviews.name: 림****
reviews.content: 포코리 캐릭터 너무귀엽구 .. 쿨매트 사이즈 확장되서 조아요
reviews.content_en: The Poco Lee character is so cute.. and I like that the cooling mat size has been expanded

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 시원하고폭신해서좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's nice and cool and soft!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
사용한지 이틀만에 강아지가 씹어서 알갱이가 다 나왔습니다. 
다*소 쿨매트도 아니고 바잇미라는 이름 걸고 하시면서 
소형견이 몇 회 물어뜯은걸로 저렇게 쉽게 파손이 되어 사용할 수 없어 교환 및 환불이 안 된다고 하시니, 앞으로 바잇미 제품을 신뢰하고 구매하기 어려울 것 같습니다.
reviews.content_en: My dog chewed it up just two days after using it and all the gel beads came out. It's not even a proper cooling mat, and BITE ME puts their name on it, but when a small dog chews on it a few times and it breaks down so easily and becomes unusable, they won't do exchanges or refunds... I don't think I'll be able to trust and buy BITE ME products in the future.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
쿨링감이 확실히 느껴져서 시원해요
가로 길이는 긴 편이지만 생각보다 크진 않아요
reviews.content_en: You can definitely feel the cooling effect and it's really refreshing. The length is on the longer side, but it's not as big as I thought.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
견생 첫 여름맞이 선물로 쿨매트 :) 

근데 저렇게 계속 물고 뜯고 난리 나는데 혹시 터질까요,,? ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Got a cooling mat as a first summer gift for my pup's life :) But he keeps biting and chewing on it so much... will it tear? ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 더위 많이타는 검둥이에게 딱 입니다. 큰거 사길 잘한거 같아요. 잘쓸게요
reviews.content_en: It's perfect for my black pup who really feels the heat. I think getting the bigger size was the right call. Will use it well!

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content: 외국인 친구에게 바잇미 제품 여러개를 선물했어요 매트도 마음에 든대요
reviews.content_en: I gave several BITE ME products as gifts to my foreign friends and they really like the mat too

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 더우면 올라가 누워있고 쫌 쌀쌀하면 매트에서 내려와 눕네요
reviews.content_en: When it's hot, he gets on it and lies down, and when it gets a bit chilly, he gets off the mat and lies elsewhere

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 여름 미리 대비해서 준비할려구요 냉장인것도 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I'm preparing ahead for summer. It's also nice that it can be refrigerated

reviews.name: 표****
reviews.content:
좀더큰걸살까순간후회했는데ᆢ
어째든오래쓸수있길기대해봅니다
reviews.content_en: I second-guessed myself for a moment wondering if I should've gotten a bigger size, but I'm hoping this will last a long time.

reviews.name: 덜****
reviews.content: 지난번것보다 사이즈가 좀더 커져서 좋아요 켄넬에 딱!!! 디자인도 넘 귀엽고 시원해요
reviews.content_en: I love that it's bigger than the previous one - it fits perfectly in the kennel!!! The design is super cute and refreshing too.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 넘 튼튼하고 좋아요 큰거 삿다가 작은거 윰차용으로 추가구매했어요
reviews.content_en: It's really sturdy and great! I originally bought the large size, but loved it so much I got the small one too for stroller use.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽습니다! 아직은 매트에 적응 못했는지 안 올라가네요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable! My pup hasn't gotten used to the mat yet, so she won't get on it lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 작년에 구입하고 너무 좋아 또 구입했어요. 소파 침대 곳곳에 두니 든든하네요.
reviews.content_en: I bought one last year and loved it so much I bought another. Having them scattered around the couch and bed feels so comforting.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
시원하라고 쿨매트 깔아주니 바로 엎드려요. 
포메라니안인데 털도 좀 더 다듬어주고 나면 좀 덜 덥겠죠
reviews.content_en: Once I laid out the cool mat to help her cool down, she laid right on it. She's a Pomeranian so once I groom her a bit more, she probably won't get as hot.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 조아요 매년 바잇밍세ㅓ 쿨매트 사고잇어요 귀여우서ㅓ 또 안살수업음 ㅠㅠㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I love it! I buy BITE ME cool mats every year now 😭😄 They're so cute I can't help but keep buying them

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: ㅇkgxktxyghxgxjfjfciv

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 2년전에 바잇미꺼 구매했는데 쿨젤이 완전 빠방하게 들어있어서 잘썼었어요 근데 제가 겨울에도 난방 바닥에 두는 바람에 곰팡이가 폈어요 ㅠ 올해 다시 구매했는데 처음만큼 빠방하지 않네요...전에껀 제가 빌려쓸정도로 시원~~했는데...조금 속상헙니다
reviews.content_en: I bought a BITE ME one two years ago and the cool gel was packed in so nicely and worked really well. But since I kept it on the heated floor even in winter, it got moldy 😢 I bought a new one this year, but it's not as full and puffy as the first one... The old one was SO cool that I even lent it to people... I'm a bit disappointed.
